Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is simple and easy to understand, but it lacks the complexity and detail of the ground truth diagram. It includes clear labels for the AKS Cluster and License Server VM, but it doesn't provide enough context or connections to other components.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is missing many components and connections present in the ground truth diagram. It only includes two elements (AKS Cluster and License Server VM), whereas the ground truth diagram has multiple subnets, DNS zones, endpoints, and other components.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram is not consistent with the ground truth diagram in terms of structure and content. It uses different icons and lacks the uniformity and comprehensive layout seen in the ground truth diagram.
